properties.name: app.backup.dir
properties.description: Directory used to store MySQL backup files.

properties.name: app.update.dir
properties.description: Directory used to store downloaded application updates.

properties.name: app.mysql.bin-dir
properties.description: Optional directory containing MySQL command-line tools.

properties.name: app.auto-update.enabled
properties.description: Enables the Windows automatic update workflow.

properties.name: app.update.check-on-startup
properties.description: Checks GitHub Releases for updates when the application starts.

properties.name: app.update.check-interval-hours
properties.description: Minimum interval in hours between update checks.

properties.name: app.update.github-owner
properties.description: GitHub repository owner used for update checks.

properties.name: app.update.github-repo
properties.description: GitHub repository name used for update checks.

properties.name: app.report.mail.enabled
properties.description: Enables sending locally stored problem reports through Resend.

properties.name: app.report.mail.api-key
properties.description: Resend API key used to send problem reports.

properties.name: app.report.mail.from
properties.description: Verified Resend sender in the form WholeSummer <reports@example.com>.

properties.name: app.report.mail.recipient
properties.description: Developer email address that receives problem reports.
